name: Housing
description: Real estate sales, rentals, mortgage lending, home insurance. Campaigns promoting residential property transactions or housing-related financial products.

regulatory_frameworks.name: US Fair Housing Act (FHA)
regulatory_frameworks.summary: Prohibits targeting by race, color, religion, sex, disability, familial status, or national origin in housing advertising.

regulatory_frameworks.name: UK Equality Act 2010
regulatory_frameworks.summary: Prohibits discrimination in housing advertising on the basis of protected characteristics including age, disability, race, religion, sex, and sexual orientation.

guidance: A mortgage product may belong to both 'housing' and 'credit'. Use 'housing' when the campaign promotes residential property — FHA restrictions are stricter than ECOA for targeting. Use 'credit' when the focus is the financial product itself without a housing context.
